0.29.0: Session-start now checks once a day for a newer released plugin version and shows a one-line reminder if you're behind (disable with VIBE_UPDATE_NUDGE=off).
Nothing is installed automatically -- updating is always your call; the reminder just tells you the exact /plugin update command to run.
0.30.0: After an update, session-start shows a one-time summary of what's new since your last session (disable with VIBE_WHATS_NEW=off).
The summary is curated and short -- full details always live in CHANGELOG.md.
